text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇹 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun told the visiting Italian foreign minister that Lebanon hopes Tuesday’s meeting between the Lebanese, U.S., and Israeli ambassadors in Washington will lead to a ceasefire and open the door to direct talks. He said a solution is possible, but not with one side only; Israel must respond to calls from Lebanon, Arab states, and the international community to stop attacks and begin negotiations. Aoun stressed that negotiations with Israel are the sole responsibility of the Lebanese state, with no other party involved. He also said Lebanon has taken security measures at Rafic Hariri airport and other border crossings, both by sea and on land, to prevent the smuggling of arms or money, and that the army and security forces are working to prevent breaches of the country’s security and economic order. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇹 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）告诉到访的意大利外交部长，黎巴嫩希望周二在华盛顿举行的黎巴嫩、美国和以色列大使会议能够促成停火，并为直接谈判打开大门。他表示，解决方案是可能的，但不能仅靠一方；以色列必须响应黎巴嫩、阿拉伯国家和国际社会的呼吁，停止袭击并开始谈判。奥恩强调，与以色列的谈判是黎巴嫩国家的唯一责任，不涉及任何其他方。他还表示，黎巴嫩已在拉菲克·哈里里机场及其他海陆边境口岸采取了安全措施，以防止武器或资金走私，军队和安全部队正努力防止破坏国家安全和经济秩序的行为。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 A Hezbollah FPV drone targeted a house in Kiryat Shmona around 5:00pm, without any siren sounding. The homeowner extinguished the burning drone using a garden hose. No injuries were reported. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 下午5点左右，一架真主党FPV无人机袭击了基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）的一所房屋，期间未拉响任何警报。房主用花园软管扑灭了燃烧的无人机。未有人员伤亡报告。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 ⚡ 🇺🇸 The Iranian President Pezeshkian condemned Trump's insult to the Pope.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 ⚡ 🇺🇸 伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬谴责了特朗普对教皇的侮辱。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 The Israeli regime army announced that 8 soldiers of this regime were injured in a Hezbollah drone attack in southern Lebanon.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列政权军队宣布，该政权的8名士兵在黎巴嫩南部的一次真主党无人机袭击中受伤。

text: Situation in south Lebanon's Bint Jbeil continues to deteriorate, with many besieged defenders martyred following an Israeli bombardment and a commitment of several divisions and majority of elite units including Maglan, Egoz and others. The football field where Sayyed Hassan gave his 2006 speech in it is still living rent free in their heads and dedicated a statement about it May God bring peace to all the families of the martyrs and may God bestow patience for the rest May God avenge their blood
text_zh: 黎巴嫩南部宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）的局势持续恶化，在以色列的轰炸以及包括Maglan、Egoz等多个师和大部分精锐部队的投入下，许多被围困的守军殉难。赛义德·哈桑（Sayyed Hassan）2006年发表演讲的足球场依然在他们的脑海中挥之不去，并专门为此发表了声明。愿上帝给所有烈士家属带来和平，愿上帝赐予其余人耐心。愿上帝为他们的鲜血复仇。

text: 🇩🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ German Chancellor Friedrich Merz: We will continue to feel the consequences of the war in Iran for a long time, even after it is over. We are preparing ourselves for a prolonged period of significant strain on the German economy, and therefore also on private households.
text_zh: 🇩🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 德国总理弗里德里希·默茨（Friedrich Merz）：即使在伊朗战争结束后，我们仍将在很长一段时间内感受到其后果。我们正准备迎接德国经济以及私人家庭长期承受重大压力的时期。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding near Karmiel, Sakhnin, and other surrounding areas in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Lower Galilee • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部卡尔米尔（Karmiel）、萨赫宁（Sakhnin）及周边地区拉响红色警报：• 对抗线 • 下加利利 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: For the second day in a row, 8 Israeli soldiers were injured when a Hezbullah suicide drone or FPV successfully impacted their gathering in south Lebanon
text_zh: 连续第二天，8名以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部被真主党的自杀式无人机或FPV成功击中他们的集结地而受伤。

text: More than 10 Hezbullah drones launched from Lebanon at northern Israel and at troops in southern Lebanon since this morning. Rocket fire was also fired at Israeli settlements.
text_zh: 自今天早上以来，从黎巴嫩向以色列北部和黎巴嫩南部的部队发射了超过10架真主党无人机。以色列定居点也遭到了火箭弹袭击。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 A senior Hezbollah official, Nawaf al‑Mousawi, said that the group’s agenda for any negotiations with Israel is the liberation of Lebanese land. “Israel will not move from a single grain of soil unless pushed by force,” he stated, adding that…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah MP Hussein al-Hajj Hassan, touring a site in Beirut's southern suburbs hit by Israeli airstrikes, criticized Lebanese Foreign Minister Youssef Rajji for stating that Lebanon had separated its path from Iran's ahead of Tuesday's negotiations with Israel. "Congratulations! The path of Lebanon with Israel has begun. Find some benefit for Lebanon from this path with the enemy that has killed here and throughout Lebanon," he said. Al-Hajj Hassan vowed that Hezbollah will not give up its principles, resistance, sovereignty, or land. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 真主党高级官员纳瓦夫·穆萨维（Nawaf al‑Mousawi）表示，该组织与以色列进行任何谈判的议程都是解放黎巴嫩土地。他称：‘除非受到武力推动，否则以色列不会从一粒土地上撤离。’并补充说……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党议员侯赛因·哈吉·哈桑（Hussein al-Hajj Hassan）在参观贝鲁特南郊遭以色列空袭的地点时，批评黎巴嫩外交部长优素福·拉吉（Youssef Rajji）在周二与以色列谈判前声称黎巴嫩已将其道路与伊朗分开。他说：“恭喜！黎巴嫩与以色列的道路已经开始。从这条与在这个国家及整个黎巴嫩杀戮的敌人的道路中，为黎巴嫩找点好处吧。”哈吉·哈桑誓言真主党不会放弃其原则、抵抗、主权或土地。 @wfwitness

text: Russian-purchased Mi-28 combat helicopters reportedly spotted in Iran’s skies. Note: We cannot confirm whether the footage is recent.
text_zh: 据报道，在伊朗天空中发现了俄罗斯购买的米-28（Mi-28）战斗直升机。注：我们无法确认该视频是否为近期拍摄。

text: Paris court convicted French cement giant Lafarge (now part of Holcim) of financing terrorism in Syria and violating EU sanctions. Between 2013–2014, Lafarge’s Syrian subsidiary paid about €5.6 million to armed groups — including ISIS — to keep its cement plant operating during the Syrian civil war. The company and eight former executives were found guilty. Former CEO Bruno Lafont received a six-year prison sentence. Lafarge had already pleaded guilty in the U.S. in 2022 and paid $778 million for providing material support to terrorist groups.
text_zh: 巴黎法院裁定法国水泥巨头拉法基（Lafarge，现为豪瑞Holcim的一部分）在叙利亚资助恐怖主义并违反欧盟制裁罪名成立。2013年至2014年间，拉法基的叙利亚子公司向包括ISIS在内的武装组织支付了约560万欧元，以维持其水泥厂在叙利亚内战期间的运营。该公司及八名前高管被判有罪。前首席执行官布鲁诺·拉丰（Bruno Lafont）被判处六年监禁。拉法基已于2022年在美国认罪，并因向恐怖组织提供物质支持支付了7.78亿美元。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The Israeli Supreme Court ruled that the IDF must ensure equal opportunities for men and women in assignments to all positions, including combat roles. In addition, the IDF was required to allow women to participate in a trial program in the maneuvering Armored Corps starting this coming November. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列最高法院裁定，以色列国防军（IDF）必须确保男女在所有职位（包括战斗角色）的分配中享有平等机会。此外，以色列国防军被要求从今年11月开始，允许女性参加机动装甲部队的试验计划。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 💥 This morning in Dnepropetrovsk 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💥 今天早上在第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克（Dnepropetrovsk） 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel NOW: Iraqis are reporting heavy jet activity reported over Al-Qaim in western Iraq, likely linked to operations supporting enforcement of the blockade. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（OSINT）即时：伊拉克人报告称伊拉克西部阿尔卡伊姆（Al-Qaim）上空有大量喷气式飞机活动，可能与支持执行封锁的行动有关。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 President Trump once again claims the Iranian Navy has been completely destroyed, now claiming 158 ships were sunk, while saying that IRGC speedboats were not sunk because ‘they posed no threat’, warning them that they will be destroyed if they approach the U.S. Naval Blockade tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 特朗普总统再次声称伊朗海军已被彻底摧毁，现在声称击沉了158艘船只，同时表示伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）的快艇没有被击沉是因为“它们不构成威胁”，并警告他们如果靠近美国海军封锁线将被摧毁。推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump warns Iran that if any of their "fast attack ships" approach the blockade they will be "immediately ELIMINATED," as the Iranian port blockade comes into force. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043698233734483995/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 特朗普警告伊朗，如果他们的任何“快速攻击舰”靠近封锁线，它们将被“立即消灭”，因为伊朗港口封锁令已生效。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043698233734483995/photo/1 推文

text: ELINT News RT @FaytuksNetwork : Trump posts about the blockade https://twitter.com/FaytuksNetwork/status/2043697488704520586/photo/1 Now: U.S. blockade on Iran has entered into force - Faytuks Network tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @FaytuksNetwork：特朗普发布关于封锁的消息 https://twitter.com/FaytuksNetwork/status/2043697488704520586/photo/1 现在：美国对伊朗的封锁已生效 - Faytuks Network 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: 'Iran’s Navy is laying at the bottom of the sea, completely obliterated - 158 ships. What we have not hit are their small number of, what they call, “fast attack ships,” because we did not consider them much of a threat. Warning: If any of these ships come anywhere close to our BLOCKADE, they will be immediately ELIMINATED, using the same system of kill that we use against the drug dealers on boats at Sea. It is quick and brutal. P.S. 98.2% of Drugs coming into the U.S. by Ocean or Sea have STOPPED! Thank you for your attention to this matter. President DJT' NEW 🔴 TRUMP: IF ANY OF IRANIAN SHIPS COME ANYWHERE CLOSE TO OUR BLOCKADE, THEY WILL BE IMMEDIATELY ELIMINATED - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（OSINT）特朗普：“伊朗海军正躺在海底，被彻底摧毁——158艘船。我们没有击中的是他们为数不多的所谓‘快速攻击舰’，因为我们认为它们构不成什么威胁。警告：如果这些船只中的任何一艘靠近我们的封锁线，它们将立即被消灭，使用我们用来对付海上毒贩的同样的杀戮系统。这既迅速又残酷。附：98.2%通过海洋或海路进入美国的毒品已经停止！感谢您对此事的关注。总统DJT” 新消息 🔴 特朗普：如果任何伊朗船只靠近我们的封锁线，它们将被立即消灭 - 开源情报 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Hungarian PM-elect Magyar says that the outgoing leadership at the Foreign Ministry is actively shredding sanctions-related documents. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 匈牙利候任总理马扎尔（Magyar）表示，外交部即将离任的领导层正在积极销毁与制裁相关的文件。推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 TRUMP: IF ANY OF IRANIAN SHIPS COME ANYWHERE CLOSE TO OUR BLOCKADE, THEY WILL BE IMMEDIATELY ELIMINATED tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（OSINT）新消息 🔴 特朗普：如果任何伊朗船只靠近我们的封锁线，它们将被立即消灭 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel Hayom: The U.S. has begun enforcing a naval blockade on Iran, targeting all vessels entering and exiting its ports across the Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz. The move is expected to inflict about $435M in total daily losses across Iran’s exports, roughly $13B per month, even as its oil revenues rose 37% during the war to about $139M per day. The IRGC had been operating a paid “protection corridor,” charging up to $2M per vessel in crypto, but the blockade could halt exports, disrupt imports, trigger food shortages, and accelerate the collapse of the rial. Iran’s oil storage could fill within 13 days, forcing production shutdowns. While the U.S. is aiming to pressure Iran without a ground war, the move risks driving up global energy prices, collapsing the ceasefire, and escalating tensions with China, which depends on Hormuz for about 45% of its Gulf oil imports ahead of a planned Trump Xi meeting. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（OSINT）《今日以色列》（Israel Hayom）：美国已开始对伊朗实施海军封锁，目标是所有进出其波斯湾和霍尔木兹海峡港口的船只。此举预计将给伊朗出口造成总计每天约4.35亿美元的损失，每月约130亿美元，尽管其石油收入在战争期间增长了37%，达到每天约1.39亿美元。伊斯兰革命卫队此前一直在运营一条付费的“保护走廊”，每艘船收取高达200万美元的加密货币费用，但封锁可能会停止出口、扰乱进口、引发粮食短缺并加速里亚尔的崩溃。伊朗的石油储备可能在13天内填满，迫使生产停工。虽然美国旨在在不进行地面战争的情况下向伊朗施压，但此举有推高全球能源价格、破坏停火以及加剧与中国紧张关系的风险，中国在计划中的特朗普与习近平会晤前，约45%的波斯湾石油进口依赖霍尔木兹海峡。推文

text: Open Source Intel A federal judge has dismissed President Trump's $10 billion lawsuit against The Wall Street Journal over its Jeffrey Epstein reporting. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043695471185555879/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（OSINT）一名联邦法官驳回了特朗普总统因《华尔街日报》关于杰弗里·爱泼斯坦（Jeffrey Epstein）的报道而对其提起的100亿美元诉讼。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043695471185555879/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 Peter Madiari: 🗣️ "Ukraine is a victim of this war. Everyone knows that. No one has the right to dictate to Ukraine under what conditions it should enter the peace process or sign a peace agreement. No country should be forced to cede its own territory - in such a case, they would be considered traitors." tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 彼得·马扎尔（Peter Madiari）：🗣️ “乌克兰是这场战争的受害者。每个人都知道这一点。没有人有权向乌克兰发号施令，规定它应在什么条件下进入和平进程或签署和平协议。任何国家都不应被迫割让自己的领土——在这种情况下，他们将被视为叛徒。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel New Hungarian PM Peter Magyar on relations with Israel: "I cannot guarantee that Hungary will continue to block EU decisions regarding Israel. As in any other case, each issue and each decision will be examined on its merits. However, I do not want to predetermine a position on the subject. We will see what decisions the union will make, and we will examine what serves the interests and justice." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（OSINT）匈牙利新总理彼得·马扎尔关于与以色列关系的表态：“我不能保证匈牙利将继续阻止欧盟关于以色列的决定。正如在任何其他情况下一样，每个问题和每个决定都将根据其自身价值进行审查。然而，我不想预先确定在这个问题上的立场。我们将看看欧盟会做出什么决定，我们将审查什么符合利益和正义。” 推文

text: Nuno Felix I swear, there is a guy who runs these accounts and is having the time of his life….. We know that you want to share the strait with us and help, but this is next level co-management. You didn't have to. 🥹 - Iran Embassy in Thailand ☫ tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 我发誓，有一个人经营着这些账户，并且正过着他一生中最快乐的时光……我们知道你想和我们分享海峡并提供帮助，但这已经是下一级别的共同管理了。你本不必这样做的。🥹 - 伊朗驻泰国大使馆 ☫ 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 The US Navy's nuclear aircraft carrier - USS George Bush - has crossed the Strait of Gibraltar and is heading towards the area of responsibility of the US Central Command, where three aircraft carrier strike groups are already gathering. 🇮🇱 Israel's Channel 12, citing Netanyahu's office, reports that the ceasefire regime with Iran may end in the near future. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 美国海军的核动力航空母舰——乔治·布什号（USS George Bush）——已穿过直布罗陀海峡，正前往美国中央司令部的责任区，那里已经集结了三个航母打击群。🇮🇱 以色列第12频道援引内塔尼亚胡办公室的消息报道称，与伊朗的停火制度可能在不久的将来结束。推文

text: Open Source Intel UKMTO: U.S. Enforcement Measures Now Impacting Iranian Ports and Hormuz Access https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043693686572101826/photo/1 U.S. IRANIAN NAVAL BLOCKADE HAS BEGUN 🔴 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（OSINT）英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）：美国的执法措施现已影响伊朗港口和霍尔木兹海峡的通行 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043693686572101826/photo/1 美国对伊朗的海军封锁已经开始 🔴 - 开源情报 推文

text: Open Source Intel Péter Magyar: "Ukraine is the victim of this war. Everyone knows that. No one should tell Ukraine under what conditions it must enter peace or sign a peace treaty. We cannot ask any country to give up its territory. If they do, they would be considered traitors." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043693591776604347/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（OSINT）彼得·马扎尔：“乌克兰是这场战争的受害者。每个人都知道这一点。没有人应该告诉乌克兰它必须在什么条件下进入和平或签署和平条约。我们不能要求任何国家放弃其领土。如果他们这样做，他们将被视为叛徒。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043693591776604347/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender In addition to comments on Russo-Hungarian cooperation, Hungary’s incoming prime minister, Peter Magyar, said that while he supports the Kremlin’s decision to continue pragmatic relationships with Hungary and would take a call from Russian President Vladimir Putin, he currently has no intention to call his Russian counterpart. Should such a call take place, Magyar said that he would urge President Putin to end the war in Ukraine. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 除了对俄匈合作的评论外，匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔表示，虽然他支持克里姆林宫继续与匈牙利保持务实关系的决定，并且会接听俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京的电话，但他目前无意致电俄罗斯同行。如果发生这样的通话，马扎尔表示他将敦促普京总统结束在乌克兰的战争。推文

text: WarTranslated KiberBoroshno confirms black smoke rising from two out of three ammonia units with a total capacity of 900,000 tons per year. There is also a possible hit on the ammonia storage facility of these units. Following the start of the full-scale invasion, the storage facility was additionally reinforced against drones with a metal structure. The hit production facility accounts for about 6% of Russia's ammonia output, while the plant as a whole is responsible for approximately 10% of the country's total ammonia production. /1742466857/12792 Monitoring channels report a strike on the "Apatit" chemical plant in the Vologda region of the Russian Federation. The plant specializes in the production of phosphorus-containing fertilizers, as well as phosphoric and sulfuric acids, which are used in the manufacturing of explosives. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated KiberBoroshno证实，三个氨装置中的两个冒出黑烟，总产能为每年90万吨。这些装置的氨储存设施也可能遭到打击。全面入侵开始后，该储存设施还用金属结构进行了额外的防无人机加固。受打击的生产设施约占俄罗斯氨产量的6%，而整个工厂约占该国氨总产量的10%。/1742466857/12792 监测频道报告称，俄罗斯联邦沃洛格达州（Vologda）的“Apatit”化工厂遭到袭击。该工厂专门生产含磷肥料，以及用于制造炸药的磷酸和硫酸。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Open Source Intel IRGC insists the Strait of Hormuz will remain open as President Trump’s blockade takes effect. U.S. IRANIAN NAVAL BLOCKADE HAS BEGUN 🔴 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（OSINT）伊斯兰革命卫队坚持认为，随着特朗普总统的封锁生效，霍尔木兹海峡将保持开放。美国对伊朗的海军封锁已经开始 🔴 - 开源情报 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 Spokesperson of the Khatam Al-Anbiyaa Central Headquarters, Ibrahim Zolfaqari: – Defending Iran’s territorial waters is a national responsibility. – As has been previously announced, enemy-affiliated vessels do not and will not have the right to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. Other vessels will continue to be allowed to pass in accordance with the regulations of the IRGC Navy. – Iran will resolutely implement a permanent mechanism to control the Strait of Hormuz. – The Armed Forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran clearly and firmly declare that the security of ports in the Persian Gulf and the Sea of ​​Oman is either for everyone or for no one. – If the security of the ports of the Islamic Republic of Iran in the waters of the Persian Gulf and the Sea of ​​Oman is threatened, no port in the Persian Gulf and the Sea of ​​Oman will be safe. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 哈塔姆·安比亚（Khatam Al-Anbiyaa）中央总部发言人易卜拉欣·佐尔法卡里（Ibrahim Zolfaqari）：– 保卫伊朗领海是国家责任。– 正如之前宣布的那样，与敌人有关的船只没有也不会有权通过霍尔木兹海峡。其他船只将继续被允许根据伊斯兰革命卫队海军的规定通过。– 伊朗将坚决实施控制霍尔木兹海峡的永久机制。– 伊斯兰共和国武装部队明确而坚定地宣布，波斯湾和阿曼湾港口的安全要么属于所有人，要么属于任何人。– 如果伊斯兰共和国在波斯湾和阿曼湾水域的港口安全受到威胁，波斯湾和阿曼湾的任何港口都不会安全。推文

text: Prof. John Mearsheimer on Trump's Hormuz blockade: It’s not only ineffective — it’s counterproductive. The idea that Iran will simply throw up its hands and surrender is not a serious argument. Why did we allow Iranian oil back into global markets? Because we needed it. We removed sanctions because without Iranian oil, the global economy could go off a cliff. If the Houthis and the Iranians shut down the Red Sea, you won’t just lose Persian Gulf oil — you’ll lose Red Sea trade as well. That would throttle the world economy. And that’s what could ultimately force the Trump administration to concede.
text_zh: 约翰·米尔斯海默（John Mearsheimer）教授谈特朗普的霍尔木兹封锁：这不仅无效，而且适得其反。认为伊朗会简单地举手投降并不是一个严肃的论点。我们为什么要让伊朗石油重返全球市场？因为我们需要它。我们取消制裁是因为没有伊朗石油，全球经济可能会陷入悬崖。如果胡塞武装和伊朗人切断红海，你不仅会失去波斯湾石油，还会失去红海贸易。那将扼杀世界经济。而这最终可能迫使特朗普政府让步。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷 Trump says IRGC fast attack boats will be “eliminated” if they get anywhere near U.S. blockade." Trump announces victory over his own imagination again
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷 特朗普称，如果伊斯兰革命卫队的快速攻击艇靠近美国封锁线，它们将被‘消灭’。” 特朗普再次宣布战胜了他自己的想象力

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump says IRGC fast attack boats will be “eliminated” if they get anywhere near U.S. blockade.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普称，如果伊斯兰革命卫队的快速攻击艇靠近美国封锁线，它们将被“消灭”。

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇺🇸 Debris of an advanced US missile believed to have fallen in Swaida. A video showing what is believed to be a sensitive part of a missile belonging to the US THAAD missile defense system in southern Syria, specifically near Swaida. According to a report published, the video likely shows the missile's infrared seeker, one of its most sensitive components. The report indicated that the part appears relatively intact despite the interception or impact conditions. This type of technology is considered highly classified, and US authorities believe that if it falls into enemy hands, it could be used for reverse engineering and developing countermeasures. The US Department of Defense has not issued any official statement. Or confirmation regarding the implementation of a debris recovery operation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇺🇸 据信坠落在苏韦达（Swaida）的美国先进导弹残骸。一段视频显示了据信属于美国萨德（THAAD）导弹防御系统的导弹敏感部件，位于叙利亚南部，具体在苏韦达附近。根据发布的一份报告，该视频可能显示了导弹的红外导引头，这是其最敏感的部件之一。报告指出，尽管存在拦截或撞击条件，但该部件看起来相对完好。这类技术被认为是高度机密的，美国当局认为，如果它落入敌人手中，可能会被用于逆向工程和开发反制措施。美国国防部尚未发表任何官方声明或确认有关实施残骸回收行动的消息。 @wfwitness

text: Trumps “blockade” of Iran has started
text_zh: 特朗普对伊朗的“封锁”已经开始

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 US President Donald Trump says Iran’s navy is “at the bottom of the sea, completely obliterated – 158 ships.” He warns that any remaining “fast attack ships” approaching a US blockade will be “immediately eliminated,” describing the response as “quick and brutal.” He adds that “98.2% of drugs coming into the US by ocean or sea have stopped,” linking the policy to maritime enforcement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普称伊朗海军“在海底，被彻底摧毁——158艘船”。他警告说，任何靠近美国封锁线的剩余“快速攻击舰”都将被“立即消灭”，并将这种反应描述为“迅速而残酷”。他补充说，“98.2%通过海洋或海路进入美国的毒品已经停止”，并将该政策与海上执法联系起来。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 "MY BLOCKADE IS BETTER THAN YOURS, POSSIBLY THE BEST EVER. THANK YOU FOR THE ATTENTION TO THIS MATTER" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 “我的封锁比你的更好，可能是史上最好的。感谢对此事的关注” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: Iran’s Navy is laying at the bottom of the sea, completely obliterated - 158 ships. What we have not hit are their small number of, what they call, “fast attack ships,” because we did not consider them much of a threat. Warning: If any of these ships come anywhere close to our BLOCKADE, they will be immediately ELIMINATED, using the same system of kill that we use against the drug dealers on boats at Sea. It is quick and brutal. P.S. 98.2% of Drugs coming into the U.S. by Ocean or Sea have STOPPED! Thank you for your attention to this matter.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗海军正躺在海底，被彻底摧毁——158艘船。我们没有击中的是他们为数不多的所谓“快速攻击舰”，因为我们认为它们构不成什么威胁。警告：如果这些船只中的任何一艘靠近我们的封锁线，它们将立即被消灭，使用我们用来对付海上毒贩的同样的杀戮系统。这既迅速又残酷。附：98.2%通过海洋或海路进入美国的毒品已经停止！感谢您对此事的关注。

text: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ War Criminal Bibi: "He (JD Vance) briefed me in detail, as members of this administration do every day, on the progress of the negotiations."
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 战犯比比（Bibi）：“他（JD·万斯）向我详细介绍了谈判的进展，正如本届政府成员每天所做的那样。”

text: China denies reports that it is sending or planning to send weapons to Iran: We oppose groundless smears or malicious associations without any factual basis.
text_zh: 中国否认有关其正在或计划向伊朗运送武器的报道：我们反对任何没有事实依据的无端抹黑或恶意联想。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework has resumed intensive meetings to name a prime minister candidate. The first gathering is at Ammar al‑Hakim’s house. Out of 12 leaders, eight must sign the official letter to the president for the candidate to be commissioned.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 Kurdistan24 : Iraq’s Shiite religious authority, the Marja’iyya, has reportedly placed a veto on a second term for caretaker Iraqi Prime Minister Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani, a senior Coordination Framework leader said. An “external veto” is also in place. Sudani’s chances are “very low”. Three main candidates are being considered: former prime minister Haider al‑Abadi, Bassem al‑Badri and Hamid al‑Shatri. Nouri al‑Maliki’s prospects are fading, and he may propose an independent candidate. U.S. President Trump has warned that Washington could withdraw support if Maliki returns to office. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 伊拉克的什叶派协调框架已恢复密集会议，以提名总理候选人。第一次聚会在阿马尔·哈基姆（Ammar al‑Hakim）的家中。在12位领导人中，必须有8位在正式信函上签字，候选人才能被任命……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 Kurdistan24：据一位协调框架高级领导人称，伊拉克的什叶派宗教权威（Marja’iyya）据报道否决了看守总理穆罕默德·希亚·苏达尼（Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani）连任。一项“外部否决”也已到位。苏达尼的机会“非常低”。目前正在考虑三名主要候选人：前总理海德尔·阿巴迪（Haider al‑Abadi）、巴塞姆·巴德里（Bassem al‑Badri）和哈米德·沙特里（Hamid al‑Shatri）。努里·马利基（Nouri al‑Maliki）的前景正在暗淡，他可能会提议一名独立候选人。特朗普总统警告说，如果马利基重返办公室，华盛顿可能会撤回支持。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Golan region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部戈兰地区无人机警报拉响。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF reports two soldiers were moderately injured and six others lightly wounded after an explosive drone struck the area where they were operating in southern Lebanon earlier this Monday. All of the injured were evacuated to hospital for medical treatment, and their families have been notified. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军报告称，本周一早些时候，一架爆炸性无人机击中了他们在黎巴嫩南部行动的区域，造成两名士兵中度受伤，另有六人轻伤。所有伤者已被送往医院接受治疗，他们的家人已收到通知。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Al-Araby Al-Jadeed: Iraq’s political scene has shifted to a new crisis over the premiership after the election of President Nizar Amidi. The Coordination Framework is deeply divided, with growing momentum to exclude its current nominee Nouri al‑Maliki.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework has resumed intensive meetings to name a prime minister candidate. The first gathering is at Ammar al‑Hakim’s house. Out of 12 leaders, eight must sign the official letter to the president for the candidate to be commissioned. The constitution allows 14 days to avoid a political vacuum. Any candidate who secures two‑thirds of the framework’s votes will be their nominee. Nouri al‑Maliki has not yet withdrawn; he may condition his withdrawal on a candidate close to him. Other names include Haider al‑Abadi, Bassem al‑Badri, Mohsen al‑Mandlawi, Hamid al‑Shatri, Qasim al‑Araji, Ali Shukri and Muhammad Sahib al‑Daraji. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 Al-Araby Al-Jadeed：在尼扎尔·阿米迪（Nizar Amidi）总统当选后，伊拉克的政治舞台因总理职位陷入了新的危机。协调框架内部分歧严重，排除其现任提名人努里·马利基的势头日益高涨……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 伊拉克的什叶派协调框架已恢复密集会议，以提名总理候选人。第一次聚会在阿马尔·哈基姆的家中。在12位领导人中，必须有8位在正式信函上签字，候选人才能被任命。宪法允许14天的时间以避免政治真空。任何获得框架三分之二选票的候选人将成为他们的提名人。努里·马利基尚未退出；他可能会以接近他的人选作为退出的条件。其他名字包括海德尔·阿巴迪、巴塞姆·巴德里、穆赫辛·曼德拉维（Mohsen al‑Mandlawi）、哈米德·沙特里、卡西姆·阿拉吉（Qasim al‑Araji）、阿里·舒克里（Ali Shukri）和穆罕默德·萨希布·达拉吉（Muhammad Sahib al‑Daraji）。 @wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 Russia is a security risk - Magyar 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 俄罗斯是一个安全风险 - 马扎尔 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Péter Magyar: We see that JD Vance stated, when he was here, that they will work with the next Hungarian government in the same way, regardless of whether it is led by Viktor Orbán or the opposition, whom they did not know at the time; I hope we will get to know each other.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：我们看到JD·万斯在访问这里时表示，他们将以同样的方式与下一届匈牙利政府合作，无论是由维克多·欧尔班（Viktor Orbán）领导，还是由当时他们还不认识的反对派领导；我希望我们能互相了解。

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Israeli Channel 12 : A Saudi royal family source said there is no solution to the Iran threat without a U.S. ground invasion and regime change, similar to the 2003 fall of Saddam Hussein. The source stressed that any alternative must be secular and acceptable to the Iranian public, preferably not Crown Prince Reza Pahlavi. Saudi Arabia believes the war has not achieved its results and that Iran has become more aggressive towards the kingdom, Israel and the U.S. However, Riyadh does not see itself as a direct party to the conflict. “If we are exposed to Iranian aggression, each incident will have its own response,” the source said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 以色列第12频道：一位沙特王室消息人士称，没有美国地面入侵和政权更迭，就不可能解决伊朗威胁，类似于2003年萨达姆·侯赛因的倒台。消息人士强调，任何替代方案都必须是世俗的，并为伊朗公众所接受，最好不是礼萨·巴列维（Reza Pahlavi）王储。沙特阿拉伯认为战争没有达到预期结果，伊朗对沙特、以色列和美国的态度变得更加激进。然而，利雅得并不认为自己是冲突的直接参与方。“如果我们受到伊朗的侵略，每一件事都会有自己的回应，”消息人士说。 @wfwitness
